Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse\('/tmp/ui2.xml'\)
root = tree.getroot\(\)
def find_nodes\(node\):
    pkg = node.get\('package', ''\)
    text = node.get\('text', ''\)
    cd = node.get\('content-desc', ''\)
    cls = node.get\('class', ''\)
    bounds = node.get\('bounds', ''\)
    if 'combined_schedule' in pkg:
        print\(f"pkg={pkg} text={repr\(text\)} cd={repr\(cd\)} cls={cls} bounds={bounds}"\)
    for child in node:
        find_nodes\(child\)
find_nodes\(root\)
EOF)

import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse\('/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/build/test-results/testDebugUnitTest/TEST-com.example.combined_schedule.AgentQualityTest.xml'\)
root = tree.getroot\(\)
print\(f'Tests: {root.attrib[\\"tests\\"]}  Skipped: {root.attrib[\\"skipped\\"]}  Failures: {root.attrib[\\"failures\\"]}  Errors: {root.attrib[\\"errors\\"]}'\)
for tc in root.findall\('testcase'\):
    status = 'PASS' if not tc.findall\('failure'\) and not tc.findall\('error'\) and not tc.findall\('skipped'\) else 'FAIL/SKIP'
    print\(f'  {status}  {tc.attrib[\\"name\\"]}  \({tc.attrib[\\"time\\"]}s\)'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
import glob, os
for f in glob.glob\('/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/build/test-results/testDebugUnitTest/*.xml'\):
    tree = ET.parse\(f\)
    root = tree.getroot\(\)
    failures = root.findall\('.//failure'\) + root.findall\('.//error'\)
    if failures:
        print\(f'FILE: {os.path.basename\(f\)}'\)
        for tc in root.findall\('testcase'\):
            if tc.findall\('failure'\) or tc.findall\('error'\):
                f_el = \(tc.findall\('failure'\) + tc.findall\('error'\)\)[0]
                print\(f'  FAIL: {tc.attrib[\\"name\\"]}'\)
                print\(f'  MSG: {f_el.attrib.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)[:200]}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse\('/tmp/ui.xml'\)
for node in tree.iter\(\):
    desc = node.get\('content-desc',''\)
    text = node.get\('text',''\)
    bounds = node.get\('bounds',''\)
    if any\(k in \(desc+text\).lower\(\) for k in ['home','classes','bus','weather','remind','add/edit',' ai']\):
        print\(f'{desc!r:30} {text!r:20} {bounds}'\)
" 2>&1 | head -20)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse\('/tmp/ui.xml'\)
keywords = ['home','classes','bus','weather','remind','add/edit','ai']
for node in tree.iter\(\):
    desc = node.get\('content-desc',''\)
    text = node.get\('text',''\)
    bounds = node.get\('bounds',''\)
    combined = \(desc+text\).lower\(\)
    if any\(k in combined for k in keywords\) and bounds:
        print\(repr\(desc\)[:30], repr\(text\)[:20], bounds\)
EOF)
